label: Contemporary Daily Rainfall
description: Daily rainfall from January 1 1990 to Previous day. These maps represent the amount of rainfall from midnight on the target day to midnight at the end of the day. Station rainfall data are interpolated using an automated optimized climate aided ordinary kriging methodology

controls.label: Date
controls.description: The date represented by the data.

controls.label: Station Fill
controls.description: The type of processing the station data goes through. Data maps are generated using partially filled station data.

values.label: Partial Filled
values.description: This data has undergone QA/QC processing. Some missing/removed station values may be filled using statistical techniques to estimate the value for that station. These values are used to generate the gridded data maps.

values.label: Unfilled
values.description: Raw station values reported by sensor stations before undergoing QA/QC processing or filling.

controls.label: Units
controls.description: The units the data are represented in.

controls.label: Anomaly Units
controls.description: The units the rainfall anomaly data are represented in.

dataGroups.label: Rainfall Data
dataGroups.description: Rainfall values as measured or computed.

dataGroups.label: Rainfall Anomaly
dataGroups.description: The amount or percent difference of the station rainfall data interpolated using an automated optimized climate aided ordinary kriging from the expected mean monthly rainfall map.
